product: Dynatrace Environment API v2 — Monitored entities

auth.token_in_url_forbidden: the api-token query parameter alternative exists but is discouraged and must not be used

first_page_query_params.entitySelector: required; must contain exactly one type(...) criterion; criteria join with commas (AND)
first_page_query_params.pageSize: defaults to 50 server-side; the exporter always sends it explicitly
first_page_query_params.from: defaults to now-3d server-side; the exporter always sends it explicitly
first_page_query_params.fields: comma-separated additional properties, each prefixed with '+', e.g. +lastSeenTms,+tags,+managementZones

pagination.rule: when nextPageKey is set to obtain subsequent pages, all other query parameters must be omitted
pagination.last_page: nextPageKey is null or absent on the final page

error_envelope.note: constraintViolations is present only on validation failures

normalization.tags: context:key=value, or context:key when the tag has no value; sorted ordinally
normalization.order: entities sorted by entityId; page-boundary duplicates keep the first occurrence

total_count_handling: totalCount from the first page is authoritative for the scan; a completed scan whose deduplicated entity count differs raises EntityDriftError carrying collected, total_count and the partial entities

constraintViolations.message: The entity selector must specify the required entity type.
